productDisplayName: Nike Men's Perfect Navy Blue Track Pant
description: CompositionFull length navy blue track pants made of 92% polyester and 8% spandex, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has handy side zipper pockets with synthetic net lining, small inner pocket, comfortable elastic waistband with inner draw string, zipper at leg ends and logo printed on the leftFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not use softeners Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Do not bleach Tumble dry low Cool iron   Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Stylish to the T, these navy blue track pants are designed with Dri-Fit technology to wick away sweat and keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym. The smart side pockets are spacious enough to hold your wallet, iPod and other essentials. The broad wasitband sits snugly, while the drawstrings offer a customised fit. The zippers at the leg ends allow more flexible movement. Team it with a nike Dri-fit t-shirt and a pair of fitness shoes for that complete in comfort.
